name: Chicken Milanese
recipeInstructions:
1. Flatten chicken breasts between sheets of waxed paper to a thickness of 3/8 inch, using a meat mallet or rolling pin.
2. Mix cheese, breadcrumbs, minced parsley, salt, and pepper in a large bowl.
3. Whisk egg with milk in a medium bowl until blended.
4. Dip each chicken breast into the egg mixture, then coat completely with the breadcrumb mixture by pressing to adhere.
5. Shake off excess crumbs.
6. Heat oil in a heavy large deep skillet to 375 degrees.
7. Add chicken and cook until golden brown and cooked through, about 4 minutes per side.
8. Using tongs, transfer chicken to paper towels to drain.
9. Transfer chicken to a platter.
10. Melt butter in a small saucepan.
11. Mix in lemon juice and pour over chicken.
12. Garnish with lemon wedges and parsley sprigs.
